units.title: Units
units.name: Name
units.create_desc: Enter the details for the new unit.
units.general_settings_description: Manage general settings for this unit.
units.company_id_required: Could not determine your organization. Try reloading the page. If the problem persists, contact support.
units.stations_and_zones_panel_description: Add counters on the subdivision itself or inside service zones (folders). Create zones here, then add stations in each zone without leaving this page. Nested subdivisions open in a full branch editor.
units.counters_direct_on_subdivision_descripti: Counters here are not grouped under a service zone.
units.nested_subdivisions_section_description: Child branches with their own tabs (services, kiosk, etc.). Open one to manage its stations and zones.
units.stations_on_zone_hint: This zone only groups counters. Add stations or nest zones and subdivisions below. Queue-facing settings stay on the parent subdivision.
units.zone_children_description: Add a nested subdivision or a service zone for grouping. Open a child to add stations, further zones, or nested subdivisions.
units.no_children_under_zone: No nested units yet. Add a subdivision or service zone — or manage stations on this unit above.
units.create_service_zone_dialog_desc: Creates a child service zone under this subdivision. Open it to add stations or further nesting.
units.create_subdivision_dialog_desc: Creates a child subdivision under this unit. Open it to add service zones, nested subdivisions, or stations.
units.unit_parent_zone_banner: This unit sits under service zone "{zone}".
units.hierarchy_help_subdivision_body: On the Stations tab you can add counters on this subdivision and create child service zones or nested subdivisions. Service zones are optional — stations can stay on the subdivision itself.
units.subdivision_general_hint: This is a subdivision (branch). Child units are managed on the Stations tab.
units.service_zone_folder_description: Groups stations in this branch only. Services, pre-booking slots, service grid, ticket screen, and kiosk are configured on the parent subdivision.
units.create_hierarchy_hint: Child units can only be created under a **subdivision** or **service zone**. Typical setup: Subdivision (root) → optional service zones → optional nested subdivisions → stations on the unit where you run the queue.

visitor_tags.title: Visitor tags
visitor_tags.description: Labels and colors staff can assign to visitors on active tickets. Tags are shared across this unit.
visitor_tags.label: Label
visitor_tags.empty: No tags yet. Create one for staff to use at the counter.
visitor_tags.sort_invalid: Sort order must be a number
visitor_tags.delete_confirm_desc: The tag "{label}" will be removed from all visitor profiles that had it. This cannot be undone.

counters.title: Stations
counters.description: Places where staff serve customers; attached to this unit
counters.name: Name
counters.no_counters: No stations found. Create one to get started.
counters.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the station "{name}".

services.title: Services
services.name: Name
services.select_desc: Select a service to edit or create a new one
services.manage_on_separate_page: Manage services for this unit on a dedicated page
services.select_to_edit_or_click_add: Select a service to edit or click "Add New Service"
services.configuration_desc: Configure services and their layout for the kiosk.
services.unsaved_discard_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?
services.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this service?

users.title: Users & Roles
users.select_user_desc: Select a user to manage their units
users.select_user_prompt: Select a user from the list to manage their units
users.assign_unit_desc: Select permissions for this user in this unit.
users.system_admin_desc: Grant full access to the system

desktop_terminals.title: Desktop terminals
desktop_terminals.description: Pair Tauri kiosk apps with a unit and default language. The pairing code is shown only once when you create a terminal.
desktop_terminals.kiosk_fullscreen_hint: Saved when the device pairs (re-pair to refresh). QUOKKAQ_KIOSK_FULLSCREEN on the device overrides.
desktop_terminals.create_desc: Choose unit and default kiosk language. Save the pairing code — it will not be shown again.
desktop_terminals.code_desc: Enter this code in the desktop app together with the API base URL. This code cannot be recovered later.
desktop_terminals.revoke_confirm_desc: Devices using this pairing code will no longer be able to sign in. You can create a new terminal instead.

grid_configuration.title: Grid Configuration
grid_configuration.overlap_warning: Warning: This overlaps with another service!
grid_configuration.select_unit_desc: Please select a unit from the left panel to configure its grid layout.
grid_configuration.remove_from_grid_error: Could not remove the service from the grid. Changes were reverted.
grid_configuration.drag_from_palette_hint: Drag to a grid cell to place, or click to use the first free cell
grid_configuration.drag_placed_hint: Drag to another cell to move (top-left snaps to that cell)
grid_configuration.resize_corner_hint: Drag the corner to resize width and height in grid cells

ad_screen.title: Ad Screen
ad_screen.ad_width_help: Set to 0 to disable ads. Recommended: 20-30%
ad_screen.image_duration_help: How long each image displays before switching
ad_screen.upload_desc: Upload images (JPEG, PNG, GIF) or videos (MP4, WebM)
ad_screen.library_desc: Select materials to display on the ad screen and manage your library
ad_screen.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Please upload an image or video.

kiosk_settings.title: Kiosk Settings
kiosk_settings.pin_help: 6-digit PIN for accessing settings on the kiosk
kiosk_settings.welcome_section_desc: Text shown on the kiosk home screen above the service grid (optional; defaults are used if empty).
kiosk_settings.welcome_title_placeholder: How can we help you today?
kiosk_settings.welcome_title_help: Large headline centered above the service buttons.
kiosk_settings.welcome_subtitle_placeholder: Select a service below to join the queue.
kiosk_settings.welcome_subtitle_help: Optional second line under the welcome title.
kiosk_settings.ticket_text_section_desc: Shown only in the ticket confirmation dialog after the guest takes a number (not on the main screen).
kiosk_settings.header_placeholder: Text at the top of the ticket confirmation dialog
kiosk_settings.footer_placeholder: Text at the bottom of the ticket confirmation dialog
kiosk_settings.printer_connection_admin_hint: Network: IP and port on the LAN. System: exact queue name on the kiosk PC (set on device or type here).
kiosk_settings.feedback_url_help: URL for the feedback form. Use '{{ticketId}}' to insert the ticket ID.
kiosk_settings.show_unit_in_header: Show unit name in kiosk header
kiosk_settings.show_unit_in_header_desc: Shown on the left next to the logo. Disable for a logo-only bar.
kiosk_settings.kiosk_unit_label_help: Leave empty to use the unit name from branch settings.

slots.title: Slot Configuration
slots.configuration_desc: Set working hours and interval for appointment slots.
slots.capacity_desc: Set the maximum number of appointments per slot for each service.
slots.generation_desc: Generate daily slots based on the configuration above. Existing slots in the range will be overwritten.
slots.day_management_desc: Manage slots for a specific day.
slots.no_slots_generated: No slots generated for this day.
slots.capacity_hint: Hint: "Total Capacity" includes existing bookings. "Available" is calculated as Total - Booked. If you want to add 1 more slot to a fully booked time, increase Total Capacity by 1.

pre_registrations.title: Pre-registrations
pre_registrations.select_unit: Select a unit to manage pre-registrations
pre_registrations.create_desc: Fill in the details to create a new pre-registration.
pre_registrations.name_required: Enter first name or last name

staff.title: Staff Panel

workstation.break_needs_no_ticket: Finish or transfer the active ticket before taking a break.

scope.title: Services you serve at this counter
scope.hint: Only tickets for the selected services appear in the queue and are eligible for Call next.

visitor_context.title: Visitor notes & history
visitor_context.change_visitor_hint: While the ticket is called or in service, open Link visitor: search the directory or enter name and phone manually (a new profile is created when needed).
visitor_context.visitor_min_chars: Enter at least 2 characters to search.
visitor_context.history_needs_visitor: Link a visitor above to see their past visits here.
visitor_context.comment_placeholder: Notes visible to your team for this ticket…
visitor_context.anonymous_hint: History is not available for anonymous walk-ins.
visitor_context.no_client: No linked visitor profile for this ticket.
visitor_context.link_modal_description: Find someone in the directory or fill in the fields — a new profile is created for a new phone number when needed.
visitor_context.pick_from_results: Pick a row below to fill the form, or type the details yourself.
visitor_context.visitor_name_required: Enter a first or last name.
visitor_context.tags_hint: Toggle tags for this visitor profile in the unit directory. Changes are audited; your reason is appended to operator notes.
visitor_context.tags_no_definitions: No tag presets exist for this unit yet. An organization admin can add them.
visitor_context.tags_reason_placeholder: Short note why you are changing tags (required to save)
visitor_context.tags_reason_required: Enter a reason for the tag change.

current.title: Current ticket
current.idle_subtitle: Call the next ticket from the queue when you are ready to serve.
current.idle_hint: The visitor card and photo will appear here after you call someone.
current.break_subtitle: Queue actions stay unavailable until you resume.

queue.title: Waiting Queue
queue.list_scoped_hint: Only tickets for the services selected under «Services».
queue.list_show_all_hint: All waiting tickets are listed — use «Call» on a row to summon any. «Call next» still only considers the services selected under «Services».

create_ticket.title: New ticket
create_ticket.description: Pick a service and optionally attach a visitor from the unit directory.
create_ticket.visitor_hint: Search by name or phone. Leave empty for an anonymous walk-in ticket.
create_ticket.visitor_min_chars: Enter at least 2 characters to search.

staff.selectUnitNoUnits: No units assigned to your account.

directory.pageSubtitle: Pick a workstation to open the staff queue for that station.
directory.insightBody: Balance load across zones. A maintenance state for counters may appear here in a future update.

kiosk.title: Welcome to QuokkaQ
kiosk.subtitle: Take a ticket or check-in with booking
kiosk.noServicesAvailable: No services available at this level
kiosk.servicesUnavailableMessage: We could not load this unit's services. Check the connection and try again.
kiosk.welcome_default_title: How can we help you today?
kiosk.welcome_default_subtitle: Select a service below to join the queue.

ticket.title: Your Ticket
ticket.wait: Please wait for your number to be called
ticket.proceed: Proceed to the counter when called
ticket.scanQrCode: Scan the QR code to open the ticket on your phone

kiosk.ticketCreationFailed: Failed to create ticket. Please try again.

messages.checkInSuccess: Check-in successful! Your ticket number is: {number}
messages.invalidBookingCode: Invalid booking code or check-in failed.

settings.title: Kiosk Settings
settings.show_header_desc: Show ticket header text in the ticket confirmation dialog
settings.show_footer_desc: Show ticket footer text in the ticket confirmation dialog
settings.printer_connection_hint: Network: raw TCP (e.g. port 9100). System: queue name from this computer (use refresh on the kiosk desktop app).
settings.system_printer_placeholder: e.g. EPSON_TM or queue from refresh
settings.system_printer_hint: Tap refresh (desktop app) to load queues from this device, or type the queue name manually.
settings.system_printer_required: Enter or select a printer queue name
settings.show_unit_in_header_desc: On the left, next to the logo. Turn off to hide the title.
settings.kiosk_unit_label_help: Leave empty to use the unit name.

lock_screen.contact_admin: This kiosk is currently locked. Please contact an administrator.

errors.not_found: Incorrect number or date has not arrived yet
errors.too_early: Time has not arrived yet, you can enter the number 30 minutes before start

upload.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 5MB
upload.hint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, SVG, WebP. Max 5MB.

login.title: Login
login.error: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to reset your password
forgotPassword.success: If an account with that email exists, we sent you a reset link.
forgotPassword.requestError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password

supervisor.title: Shift Management
supervisor.noUnitsAssigned: No units assigned to your account
supervisor.forceReleaseWarning: Are you sure you want to force release counter "{counterName}"? The active ticket will be marked as completed.
supervisor.eodWarning: This will execute the End of Day operations. This action cannot be undone!
supervisor.eodStep1: All active tickets will be marked as served
supervisor.eodStep2: All waiting tickets will be marked as no-show
supervisor.eodStep4: Ticket number sequences will be reset for tomorrow
supervisor.eodIrreversible: This action is irreversible. Please confirm you want to proceed.

dashboardUi.zonePickerLabel: Child subdivisions under this service zone
dashboardUi.zonesEmpty: No child subdivisions under this service zone yet.
dashboardUi.zonesEmptyDetail: When there are no child subdivisions, stations on the service zone itself are shown here. Otherwise add nested subdivisions under this zone in admin settings.
dashboardUi.noActiveTicket: No active ticket on this station
dashboardUi.activityDescriptionLive: Latest ticket events for this unit
dashboardUi.activityPendingScope: Select a workplace above or wait for the list to load.
dashboardUi.activityEmpty: No ticket events for this unit yet.
dashboardUi.journalCardDescription: Chronological list for the selected unit.
dashboardUi.journalFilterSearchPlaceholder: Queue number, ticket ID, or visitor name…
dashboardUi.journalFilterDateRangeHint: Inclusive range; event date is compared in the unit time zone.
dashboardUi.journalFilterTimezoneHint: Weekdays and date range use the unit time zone.
dashboardUi.snapshotDescription: Today's summary (full metrics when reporting is available)
dashboardUi.listQueueDescription: All waiting tickets, longest wait first

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subject: Subject
invitations.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. All mentions of the user will be removed from the system.

ticket_page.feedback_url_help: URL for the feedback form. Use {{ticketId}} to insert the ticket ID.

setup.title: System Setup
setup.description: Create the first administrator account to get started.
setup.name: Name

overview.title: Platform
overview.subtitle: Manage organizations, subscriptions, plans, and manual invoices.
overview.loadError: Could not load platform overview. Check your connection or try again.

companyDetail.effectiveAtFuture: Effective time must be in the future (UTC).
companyDetail.subscriptionPeriodDateInvalid: Enter a valid period start and end.
companyDetail.createSubscriptionWithInvoiceHint: Creates one subscription row for this company and links the invoice in a single step.
companyDetail.linkToExistingSubscriptionHint: If unchecked, the invoice is created without a subscription link (you can attach it later via API).
companyDetail.invoiceAmountInvalid: Enter a positive amount in minor units.
companyDetail.invoiceCreateSubConflict: This company already has a subscription; uncheck “create subscription” or use “link to subscription”.
companyDetail.invoiceSubscriptionPeriodRequired: Subscription period start and end are required.
companyDetail.invoiceSubscriptionPeriodOrder: Subscription period end must be after start.
companyDetail.saasOperatorDesc: One organization per deployment: unlimited resource quotas and the canonical legal profile for invoices and platform use. Enabling this clears the operator flag on every other company.
companyDetail.invoiceWizardHint: Create a multi-line draft, set VAT and payment options, then issue a numbered invoice (QQ-YYYY-NNNNN).
companyDetail.toastSaasOperatorError: Could not update SaaS operator setting: {message}

invoiceDraft.allowYookassa: Allow YooKassa payment link (tenant requests URL)
invoiceDraft.provisionOnPayment: Provision subscription when invoice is paid
invoiceDraft.lineMoneyHint: Amounts are in normal currency units (comma as decimal separator where your locale uses it).

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Check the form and try again.
errors.quantityInvalid: Each line needs a positive quantity.
errors.unitPriceInvalid: Enter a valid unit price (currency amount, not kopecks/cents as a plain integer).
errors.descriptionRequired: Description is required when no catalog item is selected.
errors.discountBoth: Use either discount % or discount amount, not both.
errors.discountAmountInvalid: Enter a valid discount amount in currency units.
errors.vatRateInvalid: Enter a valid VAT rate between 0 and 100 for lines that are not VAT-exempt.
errors.planRequired: Select a plan for subscription lines.
errors.periodStartInvalid: Enter a valid subscription period start.
errors.tooManyLicenseLines: Only one line may reference a subscription plan.
errors.issueInvoiceFailedDraftRestored: Could not issue the invoice ({detail}). The draft was reverted to its previous saved state.
errors.issueInvoiceFailedRollbackFailed: Could not issue the invoice ({detail}). Reverting the draft also failed ({rollback}). Refresh the page and verify the invoice on the server.

invoiceDraft.referenceCompaniesError: Could not load organizations for this draft.
invoiceDraft.referenceCompanyError: Could not load the invoice company.

catalog.title: Catalog (nomenclature)
catalog.name: Name
catalog.dialogDescription: Add or edit a catalog line used on invoices.
catalog.fieldPriceHint: Amount in major units; use a comma for fractional part (e.g. 1 234,56).
catalog.validationVatRate: Enter a valid VAT rate between 0 and 100.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.createDescription: Assign a plan to an organization without an existing subscription (organizations that already have one are disabled here).
subscriptions.validationCompanyPlan: Select an organization and a plan.
subscriptions.emptyListHint: No subscriptions yet. Create one for an organization without billing.
subscriptions.companyHasSubscriptionInfo: Organizations with a subscription are disabled in this dialog. Add another period from the company page or via manual invoices.
subscriptions.createSubCompanyHasSubscription: Choose an organization that does not already have a subscription.
subscriptions.periodOptionalHint: Leave both empty to use the default billing period (now through +1 month, UTC).
subscriptions.periodBothOrNeither: Set both period start and end, or leave both empty.
subscriptions.periodOrderInvalid: Period end must be after start.
subscriptions.createManualInvoiceWithSub: Create manual invoice linked to this subscription
subscriptions.createManualInvoiceHint: Subscription and manual invoice are created in one step with the amount and due date below.
subscriptions.invoiceWithSubValidation: Enter a positive amount and due date for the invoice.
subscriptions.toastCreateFailed: Could not create subscription. Check the form and try again.
subscriptions.toastSubCreatedInvoiceCreateFailed: Subscription created, but the invoice draft could not be created. Create it manually under Platform → Invoices.
subscriptions.toastSubCreatedInvoiceIssueFailed: Subscription created. The draft invoice could not be issued automatically. Open Platform → Invoices and issue invoice {invoiceId}.

workstations.title: Workstations
workstations.description: Choose a station to open the staff queue.
workstations.empty: No stations available for your account.
workstations.name: Name

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.description: Choose the right plan for you
pricing.pageTitle: Choose the Right Plan for You
pricing.pageSubtitle: Start with a free 14-day trial. Cancel anytime.

trial.a: The 14-day trial includes full access to all features of the selected plan without requiring payment details.

changePlan.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate the payment.

payment.a: We accept credit cards through YooKassa. Enterprise clients can pay by invoice.

limits.q: What happens if I exceed limits?
limits.a: We'll notify you by email. You can upgrade your plan, or some features will be temporarily limited until the next billing period.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of organizations already using QuokkaQ

organization.loadError: We could not load your company profile. Check your connection or sign in again.
organization.paymentAccountsBicHint: Pick a row from bank hints

billing.title: Billing & Subscription

billing.pastDueDesc: Failed to charge payment method. Please update your payment details.
billing.cancelWarning: Your subscription will be canceled on {date}. Access will remain until that date.
billing.pendingPlanChangeDesc: Your plan will change to {plan} on {date}.
billing.viewInvoicesDesc: View and download all your invoices

invoiceDetail.qrCaption: Scan to pay via bank app (Russia)

usage.title: Resource Usage
usage.description: Track usage and quotas for your plan
usage.approachingDesc: Consider upgrading your plan to increase limits.
usage.recommendationsDesc: Resource usage is tracked daily. You'll be notified when reaching 90% of any limit.
usage.tipDesc: If you regularly approach limits, consider upgrading your plan for more comfortable usage.

welcome.title: Welcome to QuokkaQ!
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your queue management system in a few simple steps

services.title: Configure Services
services.desc: Add services you provide to customers

welcome.tipDesc: You can configure all settings later. We'll only do the basic setup now.

unit.title: Create Your First Unit
unit.subtitle: A unit is your branch, office, or service location
unit.nameHelp: This name will be displayed on screens and tickets
unit.codeInvalid: Code must contain 2-6 uppercase letters or numbers
unit.codeHelp: Unique code of 2-6 characters (letters and numbers)
unit.tipDesc: You can add more units later in the admin panel.

services.title: Add Services
services.subtitle: What services do you provide to customers? Add the main ones to start.
services.canSkipDesc: You can add services later in the admin panel.

team.title: Invite Your Team

rolesHelp.title: User Roles:
rolesHelp.staff: Staff - can call and serve customers
rolesHelp.supervisor: Supervisor - can view statistics and manage queue

team.canSkipDesc: You can invite staff members later.

steps.counters: Set up service counters in the admin panel

complete.trialDesc: You have 14 days of full access to all features. Add a payment method anytime to continue after the trial period.
